"I need to be careful because it might be some kind of trap..."
There are several traps set within the dungeon. When caught in a trap,
you may take damage, your movement direction may become random for a
short period of time, or your clothing may be damaged.
There are several ways to deal with traps that cause random movement.
One method is to use an item that cures abnormal status. Another
option is to bypass them using invincibility items (note that
invincibility is required before stepping on the trap).
First and foremost, try to avoid it if possible, but please be
cautious of the presence of traps.
